emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Galmont Hotel & Spa website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 71/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 3 HTTPS mixed content
 HIGH
--------------------
- Mixed content warnings
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No accessibility landmarks
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 5 images missing alt
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No sitemap


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
